title: Engineering Solutions for Circular Economy Transition
shortDescription: Guidance through the transition from linear to circular economy, with expert-led assessments, ISO-aligned frameworks, and structured action plans from planning stages to implementation and continuous monitoring.
longDescription: Professional expertise across the full built environment spectrum: from a precise restoration of historic monuments to large-scale urban and infrastructure planning. Support in construction and renovation projects involving complex material recovery challenges, including hazardous material remediation such as asbestos removal from building facades, where circular principles must be balanced with strict regulatory requirements. Tailored action plans and checklists, grounded in global circularity frameworks and international standards that translate high-level guidelines into practical, project-specific steps, ensuring that circular economy principles are embedded at every project stage, from the early design through to end-of-life material flows.

subItems.label: Tailored Action Plan for Transition to a Circular Economy
Life Cycle Assessment for quantifying environmental impacts
Conformity to Global Circular Economy Regulations and Standards
Complex Material Recovery through Urban Mining
